cve.title: CVE-2026-9565 - haojing8312 WorkClaw Blacklist bash.rs is_dangerous os command injection
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability was determined in haojing8312 WorkClaw up to 0.6.4. This affects the function is_dangerous of the file apps/runtime/src-tauri/src/agent/tools/bash.rs of the component Blacklist Handler. Executing a manipulation can lead to os command injection. The attack can be e

cve.title: CVE-2026-9564 - SourceCodester/oretnom23 Hospitals Patient Records Management System view_patient cross site scripting
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability was found in SourceCodester/oretnom23 Hospitals Patient Records Management System 1.0. The impacted element is an unknown function of the file /admin/?page=patients/view_patient. Performing a manipulation of the argument Remarks results in cross site scripting. Re

cve.title: CVE-2026-9562 - sambitraj STUDENT-MANAGEMENT-SYSTEM Dashboard access control
cve.contentSnippet: A vulnerability has been found in sambitraj STUDENT-MANAGEMENT-SYSTEM up to 56ba287f2e9031523ccb4244cb6e3fe530e4e5d5. The affected element is an unknown function of the component Dashboard. Such manipulation leads to improper access controls. The attack may be launched remotely.

cve.title: CVE-2026-8852 - IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
cve.contentSnippet: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 is vulnerable to denial of service via the optional module mod_fastcgi module.

cve.title: CVE-2026-8850 - IBM HTTP Server is affected by multiple vulnerabilities
cve.contentSnippet: IBM HTTP Server 8.5, and 9.0 is vulnerable to denial of service via the optional module mod_ibm_upload.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48905 - Joomla! Framework - [20260520] - Inadequate content filtering within the cleanAttributes filter code.
cve.contentSnippet: Lack of input filtering leads to an XSS vector in the HTML filter code.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48904 - Joomla! Core - [20260514] - Privilege escalation through com_users webservice endpoints
cve.contentSnippet: An improper access check allows privelege escalation through the com_users group editing webservice endpoint.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48903 - Joomla! Framework - [20260519] - Inadequate content filtering within the checkAttribute filter code.
cve.contentSnippet: Inadequate content filtering within the checkAttribute methods leads to XSS vulnerabilities in various components.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48902 - Joomla! Core - [20260518] - Transport encryption downgrade for password and username reset links
cve.contentSnippet: The password and username reset features created plain http links for https connections if the "Force SSL" flag wasn't explicitly set.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48901 - Joomla! Core - [20260517] - Incorrect Cache Key Construction for InputFilter objects
cve.contentSnippet: The InputFilter::getInstance() method omitted a security sensitive parameter from the instance cache key.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48900 - Joomla! Core - [20260516] - Incorrect Access Control in com_scheduler
cve.contentSnippet: An improper access check allowed low privileged users to edit the task types of existing scheduler tasks.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48899 - Joomla! Core - [20260515] - Incorrect Access Control in sample data plugins
cve.contentSnippet: An improper access check allows privilege escalation through the com_users batch task.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48898 - Joomla! Core - [20260513] - Privilege escalation through com_users batch task
cve.contentSnippet: An improper access check allows privilege escalation through the com_users batch task.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48897 - Joomla! Core - [20260512] - MFA Authentication Bypass
cve.contentSnippet: Insufficient state checks lead to a vector that allows to bypass 2FA checks.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48896 - Joomla! Core - [20260511] - MFA Authentication Bypass
cve.contentSnippet: Insufficient state checks lead to a vector that allows to bypass 2FA checks.

cve.title: CVE-2026-48864 - Libsolv: heap buffer overflow in libsolv repopagestore via unchecked decompression of malicious .solv page data
cve.contentSnippet: A flaw was found in libsolv. This heap buffer overflow occurs during the decompression of attacker-controlled compressed data within `.solv` files due to insufficient input validation. An attacker can provide a specially crafted `.solv` file, which, when processed by a vulnerable

cve.title: CVE-2026-48697 - FastNetMon Community Edition TLS Certificate Verification Bypass
cve.contentSnippet: FastNetMon Community Edition through 1.2.9 does not verify TLS certificates on outbound HTTPS connections. The execute_web_request_secure() function in src/fast_library.cpp creates a boost::asio::ssl::context with tls_client mode and calls set_default_verify_paths() to load CA ce

cve.title: CVE-2026-48693 - FastNetMon Local Symlink Attack
cve.contentSnippet: FastNetMon Community Edition through 1.2.9 is vulnerable to a local symlink attack via predictable file paths in /tmp. The statistics file path defaults to '/tmp/fastnetmon.dat' (src/fastnetmon.cpp line 159). The print_screen_contents_into_file() function (src/fastnetmon_logic.cp

cve.title: CVE-2026-48691 - FastNetMon Community Edition Heap Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
cve.contentSnippet: FastNetMon Community Edition through 1.2.9 contains an integer overflow in the BGP AS_PATH attribute encoder. cve.title: CVE-2026-48690 - FastNetMon Community Edition Integer Overflow Heap Corruption Vulnerability
cve.contentSnippet: FastNetMon Community Edition through 1.2.9 contains an integer overflow vulnerability in the packet capture buffer allocation. cve.contentSnippet: Algernon is a small self-contained pure-Go web server. cve.contentSnippet: Rejected reason: Further research determined the issue is not a vulnerability.

cve.title: CVE-2026-47728 - Bugsink: Project scoping missing in sourcemap and debug-file lookup
cve.contentSnippet: Bugsink is a self-hosted error tracking tool. cve.title: CVE-2026-47716 - Bugsink: Issue bulk actions can affect another project’s issue if its UUID is known
cve.contentSnippet: Bugsink is a self-hosted error tracking tool. cve.title: CVE-2026-47715 - Bugsink: Issue event views can show an event from another project if its UUID is known
